storyboard.content: I keep getting stomach cramps and diarrhea
The cramping and loose stools come and go rather than staying constant
I have not seen any blood in my stool
This has been going on for a few weeks, happening on and off
The cramping is uncomfortable but not severe and it does not stop me from doing my normal activities
I am a 26-year-old woman with no significant past medical history
The symptoms are worse after eating certain foods and get better when I avoid dairy
